extra.reason: Implemented compact iPhone one-column board flow with inline search and native detail navigation.
Tuned iPad/macOS board sizing and added macOS inspector layout.
Adaptive platform UI pass completed and builds verified.
Fixed iOS/iPadOS paired-server refresh and protected server-only boards during client saves.
Added compact iPhone board switcher menu with selected-board title.
Added isolated Go CLI and Fyne UI clients with Makefile build support.
Generated and wired shared AppIcon asset catalog for macOS, iOS, and iPadOS.
Preserved native beads hierarchy and dependency metadata across import, model persistence, server JSON, Swift clients, and Go DTOs.
Added parent selection, create-child flow, relationship navigation controls, and Kanban child link previews.
Added a cross-platform hierarchy workspace with expandable parent/child rows, relationship-aware metadata chips, row selection into bead detail, iPhone navigation, and board/hierarchy switching.
Added Mac-server-only LLM provider configuration, sanitized availability status in health and /llm/status, client status display, and Go DTO/client support without exposing API keys.
Implemented AI bead field suggestions across Swift clients, macOS server endpoint, and Go client API.
Implemented AI plan review for beads and subtrees with findings, proposed changes, and explicit apply actions.
Completed the AI PM workflow with field suggestions, plan review, structured apply actions, and board/subtree status reports.
Completed the AI PM workflow with field suggestions, plan review, structured apply actions, and board/subtree status reports.
Landscape iPad already uses a dedicated board-plus-inspector workspace without the persistent sidebar; portrait keeps split-view behavior and builds pass.
Added an optional board relationship overlay with parent/child highlighting, dashed connector lines, hidden-child summary, and compact iPhone excluded.
Implemented persistent AI PM settings, run state, proposals, and reports with server/client access.
Added macOS AI PM dashboard for settings, run status, pending decisions, reports, and manual runs.
Implemented autonomous AI PM runs through server LLM plumbing, scheduled cadence, and structured proposals/reports.
Implemented AI PM proposal review and application flow with reusable BoardStore mutation results.
Added paired-server AI PM state fetch/run support and an iPhone/iPad dashboard in Server settings.
Added next-run scheduling metadata and last-run error visibility across server state, Mac dashboard, mobile dashboard, and Go DTOs.
Added deterministic AI PM project intelligence signals, persisted latest signal state, fed signals into AI PM prompts, and exposed the latest signals on Mac and mobile dashboards.
Expanded AI PM proposal changes with top-level bead creation, explicit status, blocked, and stale actions; added validation/application support, prompt schema coverage, and review UI summaries.
Implemented hierarchy graph view with parent and dependency edges.
Added persisted AI PM audit history for runs, failures, proposal status changes, and applied proposal actions, with dashboard visibility and Go DTO support.

Added a buildable macOS XCTest evaluation harness with healthy and complex fixtures covering project intelligence, JSON response decoding, proposal application, invalid action handling, and AI PM state persistence without LLM calls.
Added endpoint model discovery, model picker selection, optional API keys, Apply, and Test Endpoint controls for LLM settings.

Added configurable provider timeout, response size cap, retry/backoff, optional API-key request handling, latency/failure diagnostics, macOS settings controls, Go DTO fields, and offline configuration tests.

Added AI PM notification settings, macOS local notifications for high-risk proposals and run failures, mobile pending/high-risk decision indicators after refresh, Go DTO fields, and regression tests for legacy settings and attention state.

Added persisted board snapshots to AI PM reports, deterministic since-last-run deltas for progress, risks, blockers, and decisions, prompt context from the previous report snapshot, mobile-readable DTO fields, and legacy report decode tests.
Implemented LLM endpoint path discovery and interactive hierarchy graph editing

Added AI PM as a first-class workspace mode across macOS, iPad portrait, iPad landscape, and iPhone; refactored local and remote AI PM dashboards into reusable workspace content while preserving sheet entry points; macOS workspace can run/save AI PM settings and mobile workspace can refresh/run remote AI PM state.
Added relationship-aware hierarchy graph auto-arrange with component grouping and centered source placement

Reworked the macOS AI PM workspace into a scan-friendly dashboard with metric tiles, status, automation controls, pending decisions, project intelligence, recent reports, and audit history while preserving the sheet dashboard and mobile remote workspace behavior.

Audited the current macOS AI PM implementation and documented complete, partial, risky, and missing work in docs/MACOS_AI_PM_AUDIT.md, mapped to the remaining macOS AI PM beads with a recommended execution order and done line.

Moved macOS AI PM workspace, dashboard sheet, proposal review/apply views, report rows, project intelligence view, and audit rows out of RootView into dedicated AIPMWorkspaceViews.swift, wired the file into iOS and macOS targets, and verified builds/tests.

Completed the macOS AI PM overview workspace with a desktop header, selected-board aware run action, provider/no-board availability states, dashboard metrics, status panel, empty states, and direct LLM settings access.

Added AI PM autonomy safety controls with action budgets, high-risk approval settings, server-side application rejection rules, prompt policy guidance, proposal apply approval gates, and regression coverage.

Hardened AI PM scheduling with persisted consecutive failure counts, a configurable failure retry budget, automatic schedule pause after bounded failures, next-run visibility, UI controls, and regression coverage.

Completed the proposal review workflow with a detailed review surface for every proposal, visible risk/category/action metadata, explicit accept/apply/defer/dismiss actions, safety policy messaging, and audit-preserving status updates.

Added rollback metadata for supported AI PM proposal actions, audit-row rollback controls, rollback audit events, status/field restore behavior, and regression coverage for rolling a status mutation back to its original column.

Regression coverage now includes state decoding and persistence, proposal action application, report deltas, safety policy enforcement, scheduler failure pausing, and rollback support; the macOS test target is green offline.
Expanded the macOS AI PM status panel with provider, endpoint, model, latency, failure, timeout, response cap, retry limit, and direct settings access while avoiding API key exposure.
Improved AI PM report history with visible delta groups, long-section detail disclosure, and a Copy Markdown export affordance for reports in the macOS workspace.

Added AI PM notification route metadata, macOS notification response handling that opens the AI PM workspace, foreground presentation behavior, and visible high-risk/run-failure notification toggles in the workspace.

Covered macOS AI PM empty and onboarding states with no-board/provider availability banners, first-run status messaging, empty pending decisions/intelligence/reports/audit sections, direct LLM settings access, and no fake sample AI PM state.

Documented the macOS AI PM workflow in README, including provider setup, workspace flow, autonomy/safety policy, scheduling, rollback limitations, reports, observability, and notification routing. New screenshots were intentionally not added because the user asked not to push data-bearing screenshots.

Completed the macOS AI PM product surface: workspace UI, proposal review/apply/defer/dismiss, safety/autonomy enforcement, scheduler hardening, report history/export, rollback, notifications, provider observability, empty states, tests, and docs. Screenshot verification was explicitly deferred with rationale and no screenshots were committed per user request.
Hierarchy graph mode controls now filter/render the graph by mode and preserve relationship creation behavior.
Hierarchy graph now supports pinch magnification with clamped zoom and adjusted node drag behavior.
AI PM chat requests now fall back from json_object to endpoint-compatible response formats and preserve provider error bodies for diagnostics.
AI PM run actions are main-actor guarded, reset their busy state on completion, and show progress indicators directly beside the run controls.
